cohort_definition_id.cohort_definition_id: An identifier that specifies which cohort definition or inclusion criteria this record belongs to.

subject_id.subject_id: A unique identifier for the individual or subject included in the cohort.

cohort_start_date.cohort_start_date: The date on which the subject first met the criteria to enter the cohort.

cohort_end_date.cohort_end_date: The date on which the subject's membership in the cohort ended, either due to meeting an exit criterion or the end of the observation period.

domain_concept_id_1.domain_concept_id_1: Identifier for the first domain concept involved in the relationship.

fact_id_1.fact_id_1: Unique identifier for the first fact or record within the first domain.

domain_concept_id_2.domain_concept_id_2: Identifier for the second domain concept involved in the relationship.

fact_id_2.fact_id_2: Unique identifier for the second fact or record within the second domain.

relationship_concept_id.relationship_concept_id: Identifier for the type of relationship linking the two domain facts.

date.date: The date on which the immunization was administered.

patient.patient: A unique identifier or reference for the individual receiving the immunization.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier or reference for the healthcare visit or interaction during which the immunization was given.

code.code: A standardized code (such as from a coding system like CPT, ICD, or CVX) that identifies the specific immunization or vaccine.

description.description: A textual description of the immunization or vaccine administered.

cost.cost: The monetary cost associated with administering the immunization, typically in the local currency.

person_id.person_id: A unique identifier for the individual whose death is recorded.

death_date.death_date: The calendar date on which the death occurred.

death_datetime.death_datetime: The precise date and time when the death occurred.

death_type_concept_id.death_type_concept_id: A coded value indicating the type or source of the death information.

cause_concept_id.cause_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier for the underlying cause of death.

cause_source_value.cause_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or description of the cause of death as provided by the source.

cause_source_concept_id.cause_source_concept_id: A concept identifier that maps the source cause value to a standardized concept.

start.start: The date and time when the medical condition was first documented or became active.

stop.stop: The date and time when the medical condition was resolved, ended, or marked as inactive.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the individual who has been diagnosed with the medical condition.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the specific healthcare visit or interaction during which the condition was recorded.

code.code: A standardized code (such as ICD-10, SNOMED CT, or other clinical terminology) representing the medical condition.

description.description: A human-readable text that explains the medical condition corresponding to the code.

start.start: The date and time when the allergy was first recorded or became active.

stop.stop: The date and time when the allergy was resolved, ended, or marked as no longer active.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the individual who has the allergy.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the healthcare visit or interaction during which the allergy was documented.

code.code: A standardized code (e.g., from a terminology system like SNOMED CT or ICD) representing the specific allergen or allergic condition.

description.description: A textual description of the allergy, often providing a human-readable name for the allergen or allergic reaction.

location_id.location_id: A unique identifier for a specific geographic location.

address_1.address_1: The primary street address or building number for the location.

address_2.address_2: Additional address details such as apartment, suite, or floor number.

city.city: The city or town where the location is situated.

state.state: The state, province, or region of the location.

zip.zip: The postal or ZIP code for the location.

county.county: The county or administrative district of the location.

location_source_value.location_source_value: The original raw value or code from the source system that identifies the location.

cohort_definition_id.cohort_definition_id: A unique identifier for a specific cohort definition.

cohort_definition_name.cohort_definition_name: A descriptive name given to the cohort definition.

cohort_definition_description.cohort_definition_description: A detailed explanation of the purpose and criteria of the cohort.

definition_type_concept_id.definition_type_concept_id: A reference to a concept that classifies the type of cohort definition.

cohort_definition_syntax.cohort_definition_syntax: The formal query or logic used to define the cohort membership.

subject_concept_id.subject_concept_id: A reference to the concept that identifies the subject or entity of interest in the cohort.

cohort_initiation_date.cohort_initiation_date: The date when the cohort definition was created or became active.

care_site_id.care_site_id: A unique identifier for a specific healthcare facility or service location.

care_site_name.care_site_name: The human-readable name of the healthcare facility or service location.

place_of_service_concept_id.place_of_service_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier representing the type of setting where care is delivered (e.g., inpatient hospital, outpatient clinic).

location_id.location_id: A foreign key linking to a location record that provides geographic details for the care site.

care_site_source_value.care_site_source_value: The original identifier or code for the care site as provided in the source data system.

place_of_service_source_value.place_of_service_source_value: The original code or description for the place of service as recorded in the source data system.

id.id: A unique identifier for each care plan record.

start.start: The date and time when the care plan was initiated.

stop.stop: The date and time when the care plan was concluded or discontinued.

patient.patient: The identifier of the patient to whom this care plan belongs.

encounter.encounter: The identifier of the clinical encounter during which the care plan was created.

code.code: A standardized code representing the type or category of the care plan.

description.description: A textual description of the care plan's purpose or content.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A standardized code indicating the medical reason or condition that prompted the care plan.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual description of the reason or condition that led to the care plan.

id.id: A unique identifier for each encounter record.

start.start: The date and time when the encounter began.

stop.stop: The date and time when the encounter ended.

patient.patient: The identifier of the patient involved in the encounter.

provider.provider: The identifier of the healthcare provider who conducted the encounter.

encounterclass.encounterclass: The classification or type of the encounter, such as inpatient, outpatient, or emergency.

code.code: A standardized code representing the encounter type, often from a coding system like CPT or ICD.

description.description: A textual description of the encounter, providing details about its nature or purpose.

cost.cost: The monetary cost associated with the encounter, typically in the local currency.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A code indicating the primary reason or diagnosis for the encounter.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual description explaining the reason or diagnosis for the encounter.

id.id: A unique identifier for each imaging study record.

date.date: The date when the imaging study was performed.

patient.patient: A reference identifier for the patient who underwent the imaging study.

encounter.encounter: A reference identifier for the healthcare encounter associated with the imaging study.

body site code.body site code: A standardized code representing the anatomical body site that was imaged.

body site description.body site description: A textual description of the anatomical body site that was imaged.

modality code.modality code: A standardized code representing the imaging modality used (e.g., CT, MRI, X-ray).

modality description.modality description: A textual description of the imaging modality used.

sop code.sop code: A standardized code representing the DICOM Service-Object Pair class for the imaging study.

sop description.sop description: A textual description of the DICOM Service-Object Pair class for the imaging study.

cdm_source_name.cdm_source_name: The full name of the data source from which the Common Data Model (CDM) is derived.

cdm_source_abbreviation.cdm_source_abbreviation: A short abbreviation or acronym used to refer to the CDM source.

cdm_holder.cdm_holder: The organization or entity that holds and maintains the CDM data.

source_description.source_description: A textual description providing details about the original data source.

source_documentation_reference.source_documentation_reference: A reference or link to documentation that describes the source data.

cdm_etl_reference.cdm_etl_reference: A reference or link to documentation detailing the Extract, Transform, Load (ETL) process used to populate the CDM.

source_release_date.source_release_date: The date when the original source data was released or made available.

cdm_release_date.cdm_release_date: The date when the CDM version derived from the source was released.

cdm_version.cdm_version: The version identifier of the Common Data Model used.

vocabulary_version.vocabulary_version: The version identifier of the standardized vocabulary or terminology used within the CDM.

observation_period_id.observation_period_id: A unique identifier for each observation period record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the person to whom this observation period pertains.

observation_period_start_date.observation_period_start_date: The date on which the observation period for the person begins.

observation_period_end_date.observation_period_end_date: The date on which the observation period for the person ends.

period_type_concept_id.period_type_concept_id: A concept identifier that classifies the type of observation period (e.g., enrollment, study period).

id.id: A unique identifier for each organization in the dataset.

name.name: The official name of the organization.

address.address: The street address where the organization is located.

city.city: The city in which the organization is situated.

state.state: The state or province where the organization operates.

zip.zip: The postal or ZIP code for the organization's location.

phone.phone: The primary contact phone number for the organization.

utilization.utilization: A metric indicating the usage or capacity utilization of the organization's resources or services.

device_exposure_id.device_exposure_id: A unique identifier for each device exposure record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual who was exposed to the device.

device_concept_id.device_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier representing the type of device used.

device_exposure_start_date.device_exposure_start_date: The calendar date when the device exposure began.

device_exposure_start_datetime.device_exposure_start_datetime: The precise date and time when the device exposure began.

device_exposure_end_date.device_exposure_end_date: The calendar date when the device exposure ended.

device_exposure_end_datetime.device_exposure_end_datetime: The precise date and time when the device exposure ended.

device_type_concept_id.device_type_concept_id: A concept identifier indicating the type of record or context of the device exposure.

unique_device_id.unique_device_id: A unique identifier for the specific physical device instance, if available.

quantity.quantity: The number of devices used or the quantity associated with the exposure.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who administered or managed the device exposure.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the healthcare visit during which the device exposure occurred.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: A more granular identifier for a sub‑component of a visit, if applicable.

device_source_value.device_source_value: The original code or description for the device as it appeared in the source data.

device_source_concept_id.device_source_concept_id: The concept identifier from the source vocabulary that maps to the device.

start.start: The date and time when the medication regimen was initiated.

stop.stop: The date and time when the medication regimen was discontinued or completed, if applicable.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the individual receiving the medication.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the healthcare visit or event during which the medication was prescribed or administered.

code.code: A standardized code (e.g., RxNorm, NDC) representing the specific medication.

description.description: A textual name or label describing the medication.

cost.cost: The monetary expense associated with the medication, typically in the local currency.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A standardized code indicating the medical reason or diagnosis for prescribing the medication.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual description of the medical reason or diagnosis for the medication prescription.

date.date: The date on which the observation was recorded.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient associated with the observation.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the healthcare encounter during which the observation was made.

code.code: A standardized code (e.g., LOINC, SNOMED) representing the type of observation.

description.description: A human-readable description of the observation type.

value.value: The numeric or qualitative result of the observation.

units.units: The unit of measurement for the observation value, if applicable.

type.type: The category or classification of the observation (e.g., lab, vital sign, imaging).

payer_plan_period_id.payer_plan_period_id: A unique identifier for each payer plan period record.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual associated with the payer plan period.

payer_plan_period_start_date.payer_plan_period_start_date: The date when the payer plan period begins.

payer_plan_period_end_date.payer_plan_period_end_date: The date when the payer plan period ends.

payer_source_value.payer_source_value: The source value or code representing the payer organization.

plan_source_value.plan_source_value: The source value or code representing the specific health plan.

family_source_value.family_source_value: The source value or code representing the family or group associated with the plan.

condition_occurrence_id.condition_occurrence_id: A unique identifier for each recorded occurrence of a medical condition.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual to whom this condition occurrence pertains.

condition_concept_id.condition_concept_id: The standardized concept identifier representing the specific medical condition.

condition_start_date.condition_start_date: The date on which the condition was first noted or diagnosed.

condition_start_datetime.condition_start_datetime: The precise date and time when the condition was first noted or diagnosed.

condition_end_date.condition_end_date: The date on which the condition was resolved or ended, if applicable.

condition_end_datetime.condition_end_datetime: The precise date and time when the condition was resolved or ended, if applicable.

condition_type_concept_id.condition_type_concept_id: The concept identifier indicating the type or provenance of the condition record, such as diagnosis, problem list, or self-reported.

condition_status_concept_id.condition_status_concept_id: The concept identifier representing the clinical status of the condition, such as active, resolved, or chronic.

stop_reason.stop_reason: A textual reason for why the condition occurrence was stopped or ended, if recorded.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who documented or managed this condition occurrence.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of the healthcare visit during which this condition was recorded.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier of a more granular visit detail, such as a specific encounter within a broader visit.

condition_source_value.condition_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or text for the condition as it appeared in the source data.

condition_source_concept_id.condition_source_concept_id: The concept identifier that maps to the original source value for the condition.

condition_status_source_value.condition_status_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or text for the condition status as it appeared in the source data.

date.date: The date on which the medical procedure was performed.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient who underwent the procedure.

encounter.encounter: A unique identifier for the specific healthcare visit or encounter during which the procedure occurred.

code.code: A standardized code (e.g., CPT, ICD-10-PCS) representing the specific medical procedure performed.

description.description: A textual description of the medical procedure corresponding to the code.

cost.cost: The monetary cost or charge associated with performing the procedure.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A standardized code (e.g., ICD-10) indicating the medical reason or diagnosis that justified performing the procedure.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual description of the medical reason or diagnosis corresponding to the reason code.

id.id: A unique identifier for each healthcare provider in the dataset.

organization.organization: The name of the healthcare organization or facility where the provider is affiliated.

name.name: The full name of the healthcare provider.

gender.gender: The gender of the healthcare provider, typically recorded as male, female, or other.

speciality.speciality: The medical or professional specialty area of the healthcare provider.

address.address: The street address of the provider's practice or primary location.

city.city: The city where the provider's address is located.

state.state: The state or region where the provider's address is located.

zip.zip: The postal or ZIP code for the provider's address.

utilization.utilization: A metric indicating the level of usage or activity associated with the provider, such as patient visits or services rendered.

note_id.note_id: A unique identifier for each note entry in the system.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual to whom this note pertains.

note_event_id.note_event_id: An identifier linking the note to a specific event or occurrence.

note_event_field_concept_id.note_event_field_concept_id: A concept identifier that categorizes the type of event field associated with the note.

note_date.note_date: The calendar date on which the note was recorded.

note_datetime.note_datetime: The precise date and time when the note was created or documented.

note_type_concept_id.note_type_concept_id: A concept identifier that classifies the type or category of the note.

note_class_concept_id.note_class_concept_id: A concept identifier that specifies the class or broader grouping of the note.

note_title.note_title: A brief title or heading summarizing the content of the note.

note_text.note_text: The full textual content or body of the note.

encoding_concept_id.encoding_concept_id: A concept identifier that indicates the encoding or format used for the note text.

language_concept_id.language_concept_id: A concept identifier that denotes the language in which the note is written.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider or clinician who authored the note.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: An identifier linking the note to a specific visit or encounter in the healthcare system.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: An identifier linking the note to a detailed sub-component or segment of a visit.

note_source_value.note_source_value: The original source value or code for the note as provided in the raw data.

drug_exposure_id.drug_exposure_id: A unique identifier for each drug exposure record in the database.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual who was exposed to the drug.

drug_concept_id.drug_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier representing the specific drug administered.

drug_exposure_start_date.drug_exposure_start_date: The calendar date when the drug exposure began.

drug_exposure_start_datetime.drug_exposure_start_datetime: The precise date and time when the drug exposure started.

drug_exposure_end_date.drug_exposure_end_date: The calendar date when the drug exposure ended.

drug_exposure_end_datetime.drug_exposure_end_datetime: The precise date and time when the drug exposure concluded.

verbatim_end_date.verbatim_end_date: The original end date as recorded in the source data, which may differ from the standardized end date.

drug_type_concept_id.drug_type_concept_id: A concept identifier that classifies the type of drug exposure, such as prescription, inpatient administration, or over-the-counter.

stop_reason.stop_reason: The reason why the drug administration was discontinued, if applicable.

refills.refills: The number of times the prescription was refilled for this drug exposure.

quantity.quantity: The amount of the drug dispensed or administered, expressed in the appropriate unit.

days_supply.days_supply: The number of days the supplied quantity of the drug is intended to last.

sig.sig: The instructions for use as written on the prescription, often in Latin abbreviations.

route_concept_id.route_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier representing the route of administration, such as oral, intravenous, or topical.

lot_number.lot_number: The manufacturer's lot or batch number for the specific drug product.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who prescribed or administered the drug.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier linking this drug exposure to a specific healthcare visit record.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier linking this drug exposure to a detailed sub-event within a healthcare visit.

drug_source_value.drug_source_value: The original code or description for the drug as it appeared in the source data.

drug_source_concept_id.drug_source_concept_id: The concept identifier from the source vocabulary system that corresponds to the drug.

route_source_value.route_source_value: The original code or description for the route of administration as it appeared in the source data.

dose_unit_source_value.dose_unit_source_value: The original unit of measure for the drug quantity as recorded in the source data.

measurement_id.measurement_id: A unique identifier for each measurement record in the database.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual to whom the measurement pertains.

measurement_concept_id.measurement_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier representing the type of measurement taken.

measurement_date.measurement_date: The calendar date on which the measurement was performed.

measurement_datetime.measurement_datetime: The precise date and time when the measurement was recorded.

measurement_time.measurement_time: The time of day when the measurement occurred, if recorded separately.

measurement_type_concept_id.measurement_type_concept_id: A concept identifier indicating the method or context of the measurement.

operator_concept_id.operator_concept_id: A concept identifier for the operator or comparison used in the measurement.

value_as_number.value_as_number: The numerical result of the measurement, if applicable.

value_as_concept_id.value_as_concept_id: A concept identifier representing a categorical or coded measurement result.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier for the unit of measurement.

range_low.range_low: The lower bound of the normal or expected range for the measurement.

range_high.range_high: The upper bound of the normal or expected range for the measurement.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who performed or ordered the measurement.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier linking the measurement to a specific healthcare visit.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier for a more granular detail within a visit, if applicable.

measurement_source_value.measurement_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or description from the source system.

measurement_source_concept_id.measurement_source_concept_id: A concept identifier mapping to the source value in the vocabulary.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The original unit of measurement as recorded in the source data.

value_source_value.value_source_value: The original value of the measurement as recorded in the source system.

procedure_occurrence_id.procedure_occurrence_id: A unique identifier for each recorded procedure event in the database.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual on whom the procedure was performed.

procedure_concept_id.procedure_concept_id: A standardized code representing the type of procedure performed, mapped to a common vocabulary.

procedure_date.procedure_date: The calendar date on which the procedure was carried out.

procedure_datetime.procedure_datetime: The precise date and time when the procedure occurred.

procedure_type_concept_id.procedure_type_concept_id: A code indicating the context or source of the procedure record, such as inpatient, outpatient, or billing.

modifier_concept_id.modifier_concept_id: A standardized code that provides additional detail or qualification about the procedure.

quantity.quantity: The number of times the procedure was performed or the amount associated with it.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who performed or oversaw the procedure.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: A link to the visit record during which the procedure took place.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: A more granular identifier for a specific segment or detail within a visit, if applicable.

procedure_source_value.procedure_source_value: The original code or description for the procedure as recorded in the source data.

procedure_source_concept_id.procedure_source_concept_id: The concept identifier corresponding to the source value, if mapped to the standard vocabulary.

modifier_source_value.modifier_source_value: The original modifier code or description from the source data.

person_id.person_id: A unique identifier for each individual in the dataset.

gender_concept_id.gender_concept_id: A standardized code representing the gender of the person.

year_of_birth.year_of_birth: The year in which the person was born.

month_of_birth.month_of_birth: The month in which the person was born.

day_of_birth.day_of_birth: The day of the month on which the person was born.

birth_datetime.birth_datetime: The exact date and time of the person's birth.

death_datetime.death_datetime: The exact date and time of the person's death, if applicable.

race_concept_id.race_concept_id: A standardized code representing the race of the person.

ethnicity_concept_id.ethnicity_concept_id: A standardized code representing the ethnicity of the person.

location_id.location_id: An identifier linking to the geographic location associated with the person.

provider_id.provider_id: An identifier for the healthcare provider primarily associated with the person.

care_site_id.care_site_id: An identifier for the healthcare facility or site where the person receives care.

person_source_value.person_source_value: The original identifier or code for the person from the source system.

gender_source_value.gender_source_value: The original gender value as recorded in the source system.

gender_source_concept_id.gender_source_concept_id: A source-specific concept identifier for gender.

race_source_value.race_source_value: The original race value as recorded in the source system.

race_source_concept_id.race_source_concept_id: A source-specific concept identifier for race.

ethnicity_source_value.ethnicity_source_value: The original ethnicity value as recorded in the source system.

ethnicity_source_concept_id.ethnicity_source_concept_id: A source-specific concept identifier for ethnicity.

provider_id.provider_id: A unique identifier for each healthcare provider in the dataset.

provider_name.provider_name: The full name of the healthcare provider.

npi.npi: The National Provider Identifier, a unique 10-digit identification number for covered healthcare providers in the United States.

dea.dea: The Drug Enforcement Administration registration number, authorizing the provider to prescribe controlled substances.

specialty_concept_id.specialty_concept_id: A standardized code representing the provider's medical specialty within the concept vocabulary.

care_site_id.care_site_id: An identifier linking the provider to a specific healthcare facility or location where they practice.

year_of_birth.year_of_birth: The year in which the provider was born.

gender_concept_id.gender_concept_id: A standardized code representing the provider's gender within the concept vocabulary.

provider_source_value.provider_source_value: The original, non-standardized identifier or code for the provider as recorded in the source system.

specialty_source_value.specialty_source_value: The original, non-standardized description or code of the provider's specialty as recorded in the source system.

specialty_source_concept_id.specialty_source_concept_id: A source-specific concept identifier for the provider's specialty, mapping to the source vocabulary.

gender_source_value.gender_source_value: The original, non-standardized representation of the provider's gender as recorded in the source system.

gender_source_concept_id.gender_source_concept_id: A source-specific concept identifier for the provider's gender, mapping to the source vocabulary.

id.id: A unique identifier for each patient in the system.

birthdate.birthdate: The date on which the patient was born.

deathdate.deathdate: The date on which the patient died, if applicable.

ssn.ssn: The patient's Social Security Number, used for identification and records.

drivers.drivers: The patient's driver's license number, if available.

passport.passport: The patient's passport number, if available.

prefix.prefix: An honorific title such as Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc., preceding the patient's name.

first.first: The patient's first or given name.

last.last: The patient's last name or surname.

suffix.suffix: A generational or professional suffix following the patient's name, such as Jr., Sr., or MD.

maiden.maiden: The patient's maiden name, typically used for individuals who have changed their last name.

marital.marital: The patient's marital status, such as single, married, divorced, or widowed.

race.race: The patient's racial or ethnic background as self-reported or recorded.

ethnicity.ethnicity: The patient's cultural or ethnic identity, often distinct from race.

gender.gender: The patient's gender identity, such as male, female, or non-binary.

birthplace.birthplace: The city, state, or country where the patient was born.

address.address: The street address where the patient currently resides.

city.city: The city component of the patient's current address.

state.state: The state or province component of the patient's current address.

zip.zip: The postal or ZIP code for the patient's current address.

observation_id.observation_id: A unique identifier for each observation record in the dataset.

person_id.person_id: The identifier of the individual to whom the observation pertains.

observation_concept_id.observation_concept_id: A standardized code representing the type or category of observation made.

observation_date.observation_date: The calendar date on which the observation was recorded.

observation_datetime.observation_datetime: The precise date and time when the observation was documented.

observation_type_concept_id.observation_type_concept_id: A code indicating the method or context in which the observation was obtained.

value_as_number.value_as_number: The numerical result or measurement value associated with the observation.

value_as_string.value_as_string: The textual or descriptive result of the observation.

value_as_concept_id.value_as_concept_id: A standardized code representing the categorical value of the observation.

qualifier_concept_id.qualifier_concept_id: A code providing additional context or qualification to the observation value.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: A standardized code representing the unit of measurement for the numerical value.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider who recorded or reported the observation.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier linking the observation to a specific healthcare visit.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: The identifier linking the observation to a detailed sub-event within a visit.

observation_source_value.observation_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or description from the source system.

observation_source_concept_id.observation_source_concept_id: A standardized code mapped from the original source value.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The original unit of measurement as recorded in the source data.

qualifier_source_value.qualifier_source_value: The original qualifier text or code from the source system.

observation_event_id.observation_event_id: An identifier for a broader event or episode associated with the observation.

obs_event_field_concept_id.obs_event_field_concept_id: A standardized code representing the field or aspect of the observation event.

value_as_datetime.value_as_datetime: The date and time value when the observation result is itself a timestamp.

specimen_id.specimen_id: A unique identifier for each specimen record in the database.

person_id.person_id: The identifier linking the specimen to the individual from whom it was collected.

specimen_concept_id.specimen_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier representing the type of specimen collected.

specimen_type_concept_id.specimen_type_concept_id: A concept identifier indicating the classification or category of the specimen type.

specimen_date.specimen_date: The calendar date on which the specimen was collected.

specimen_datetime.specimen_datetime: The precise date and time when the specimen was collected.

quantity.quantity: The amount or volume of the specimen collected.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier for the unit of measurement of the specimen quantity.

anatomic_site_concept_id.anatomic_site_concept_id: A concept identifier representing the anatomical location from which the specimen was taken.

disease_status_concept_id.disease_status_concept_id: A concept identifier indicating the disease status of the individual at the time of specimen collection.

specimen_source_id.specimen_source_id: An identifier for the source system or origin from which the specimen data was derived.

specimen_source_value.specimen_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or description for the specimen as provided by the source.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The original, non-standardized unit of measurement as provided by the source.

anatomic_site_source_value.anatomic_site_source_value: The original, non-standardized description of the anatomical site as provided by the source.

disease_status_source_value.disease_status_source_value: The original, non-standardized description of the disease status as provided by the source.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: A unique identifier for each recorded visit occurrence.

person_id.person_id: The identifier linking the visit to a specific individual in the database.

visit_concept_id.visit_concept_id: A standardized code representing the type of visit, such as inpatient or outpatient.

visit_start_date.visit_start_date: The calendar date when the visit began.

visit_start_datetime.visit_start_datetime: The precise date and time when the visit started.

visit_end_date.visit_end_date: The calendar date when the visit concluded.

visit_end_datetime.visit_end_datetime: The precise date and time when the visit ended.

visit_type_concept_id.visit_type_concept_id: A code indicating the classification or context of the visit, such as EHR or claim.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier for the healthcare provider responsible for the visit.

care_site_id.care_site_id: The identifier for the facility or location where the visit took place.

visit_source_value.visit_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or description for the visit from the source data.

visit_source_concept_id.visit_source_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier derived from the source value for the visit.

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: A standardized code representing the location or setting from which the patient was admitted.

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or description for the admission source.

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: A standardized code representing the location or setting to which the patient was discharged.

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or description for the discharge destination.

preceding_visit_occurrence_id.preceding_visit_occurrence_id: The identifier of a previous visit that directly preceded this one, if applicable.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: A unique identifier for each detailed visit record within the system.

person_id.person_id: The identifier linking this visit detail to a specific individual in the person table.

visit_detail_concept_id.visit_detail_concept_id: A standardized concept code representing the type or nature of this visit detail.

visit_detail_start_date.visit_detail_start_date: The calendar date when this visit detail began.

visit_detail_start_datetime.visit_detail_start_datetime: The precise date and time when this visit detail started.

visit_detail_end_date.visit_detail_end_date: The calendar date when this visit detail concluded.

visit_detail_end_datetime.visit_detail_end_datetime: The precise date and time when this visit detail ended.

visit_detail_type_concept_id.visit_detail_type_concept_id: A concept code indicating the provenance or classification of this visit detail record.

provider_id.provider_id: The identifier of the healthcare provider associated with this visit detail.

care_site_id.care_site_id: The identifier of the facility or location where this visit detail took place.

visit_detail_source_value.visit_detail_source_value: The original, non-standardized code or description for the visit detail as captured in the source data.

visit_detail_source_concept_id.visit_detail_source_concept_id: The concept identifier corresponding to the source value, if mapped to the standard vocabulary.

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: The original source value indicating where the patient was admitted from prior to this visit detail.

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: The standardized concept identifier for the admission source.

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: The original source value indicating where the patient was discharged to after this visit detail.

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: The standardized concept identifier for the discharge destination.

preceding_visit_detail_id.preceding_visit_detail_id: The identifier of the visit detail that immediately preceded this one in sequence.

visit_detail_parent_id.visit_detail_parent_id: The identifier of a parent visit detail to which this detail is hierarchically related.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The identifier linking this visit detail to a broader visit occurrence record.
